title: Suet and Delight Thai Meatballs
description: Thai-inspired meatballs made with suet and delight, served with a sweet and spicy sauce. Perfect for a quick and easy dinner.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine suet, delight, curry paste, fish sauce, sugar, egg, breadcrumbs, cilantro, and mint. Mix well.
Use your hands to shape the mixture into small meatballs, about 1 1/2 inches (3.8 cm) in diameter.
Place the meatballs on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle with vegetable oil and gently roll the meatballs to coat evenly.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until lightly browned on the outside.
While the meatballs are baking, prepare the sauce by heating 2 tablespoons of oil in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Add 2 tablespoons of curry paste and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add 1 cup of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 5-7 minutes or until the sauce has thickened slightly.
Remove the meatballs from the oven and carefully place them in the saucepan with the sauce.
Toss the meatballs in the sauce to coat evenly.
Serve hot garnished with chopped cilantro and mint.
